steps.title: Find the y-intercept from the graph
steps.content: The y-intercept is where the graph crosses the y-axis, occurring at $x = 0$. Reading directly from the graph, when $x = 0$, the height is $y = 8$ inches.

steps.title: Interpret the y-intercept in context
steps.content: Since $x$ represents seconds after the marble started moving and $y$ represents height in inches above the ground, the point $(0, 8)$ tells us the marble's height was 8 inches at the moment it started ($x = 0$). That matches choice B — B is correct.
